materials.name: Gloss White Air Release
materials.description: Gloss white 2mil thick wrap vinyl. Outdoor rated, air release adhesive for easy bubble-free application over flat and curved surfaces alike. 3 Year Outdoor Rated Ink and Vinyl

materials.name: Laminated PVC
materials.description: Extra Durable PVC + Lamination. Outdoor rated (5-7 yrs), air release adhesive for easy bubble-free application over flat and curved surfaces alike.

materials.name: Holographic
materials.description: Premium Iridescent finish that catches the light. Perfect for limited edition prints and retro aesthetic designs.

materials.name: Glitter
materials.description: Sparkly, textured glitter finish for a highly reflective and premium look.

materials.name: Matte Soft-Touch
materials.description: A velvety, soft-touch matte finish that diffuses light and feels incredibly premium.

complexity.description: Multiplier based on the perimeter of the cut path.
